output.sparql:
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
SELECT ?stadium WHERE {
  ?stadium wdt:P31 wd:Q2064783 ; rdfs:label ?label
  FILTER(LANG(?label) = 'es' && CONTAINS(LCASE(?label) , 'monumental'))
}
output.answer: The stadium is the Estadio Monumental (officially known as Estadio Monumental Antonio Vespucio Videla), home of Club Atlético River Plate in Buenos Aires, Argentina. The name 'Monumental de la Vicente López' appears to be a common misstatement of the actual name; the stadium is located in Núñez, not Vicente López.
